articles.title: Roman Anthony: Red Sox 2-7 start is ‘unacceptable to the fans’
articles.description:
After nine games, the Red Sox have the worst record in baseball.

The post Roman Anthony: Red Sox 2-7 start is ‘unacceptable to the fans’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox start season 2-7, worst record in MLB after nine games.
Outfielder Roman Anthony expresses disappointment, calling the start 'unacceptable to the fans.'
Fans in Boston are concerned about the team's performance and future prospects.

articles.title: Is this really Boston’s most annoying escalator?
articles.description:
A Reddit post targeting a broken escalator at Copley Place sparked a bigger debate over which one frustrates commuters most. We want to hear from readers.

The post Is this really Boston’s most annoying escalator? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Reddit post highlights frustrations with broken escalator at Copley Place.
Debate over annoying escalators engages Boston commuters and residents.
Copley Place escalator issues may affect daily travel for local shoppers.

articles.title: NFL analyst predicts two possible Patriots draft trades
articles.description:
The Patriots are currently set to pick 31st overall in the first round when the NFL Draft begins on April 23.

The post NFL analyst predicts two possible Patriots draft trades appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots hold the 31st overall pick in the NFL Draft on April 23.
Analyst predicts two potential trade scenarios for the Patriots' first-round pick.
Draft trades could significantly impact team rebuilding efforts for Boston fans.

articles.title: The mystifying syndrome that makes people spontaneously drunk
articles.description:
Auto-brewery syndrome can wreak havoc on people’s lives and reputations.

The post The mystifying syndrome that makes people spontaneously drunk appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Auto-brewery syndrome causes individuals to feel intoxicated without consuming alcohol.
Boston residents may face legal issues or social stigma due to this condition.
Awareness of this syndrome is crucial for healthcare providers in Boston.
